title: Flooring Biz. Desired Territory. Rising Revenue. Positive Cash Flow.
supportTraining: 90 days post-training, 30 days of Ride-Alongs, 2 coaching calls per month, plus document handoff and warm introductions. Owner will stay on, if requested. Additionally, the Franchisor will provide excellent start-up training and ongoing support as with any new/existing franchisee.
description:
FOR SALE: is a resale of an existing franchise.
Step into this turnkey situation for the price of a new territory. The hard startup work has created a market presence of great brand recognition and a 5-Star rating from 3 years of excellently completed projects.
This is a design-driven, mobile flooring retail and installation business serving its protected Northeast to South of Austin territory. The business offers in-home consultations, project design, and professional installation across a broad mix of residential and light commercial customers. This franchisee leverages the national franchise network’s supply chain, brand reputation, and marketing resources to maintain steady lead flow, revenues, and brand credibility.

The Franchisor has a long-term, successful biz model that allows franchise owners to experience immense growth within their territory — potentially resulting in a multimillion-dollar business. Highest rated flooring company in North America.
No flooring experience needed: Many franchisees have a background in business, marketing, or sales. This franchise is for anyone who desires to be their own CEO and build a multi-million-dollar business.

Key Strengths:
- Turnkey franchise with established local presence and recognizable brand.
- A complete list of assets are included in the sale price.
- Improving revenues with growing market reach since 2023.
- Solid growth trajectory supported by marketing systems and vendor relationships.
- Opportunity for a motivated owner-operator to capture immediate cash flow.

Is your background: Business acumen? Marketing? Sales? Want to be the CEO of your own successful company?
Study this biz to see that it can provide you with the financial and lifestyle goals you seek.

Research this one.
Contact me NOW!!!!
